items.title: Predicting Purdue Men’s Basketball Starting Lineup
items.summary: The staff roundtable this week is all about who will be the first five players who step onto the floor for Purdue basketball this season. This is obviously set to be a very special season with expectations that are through the roof, but it’s on the players and the coaching staff to meet those high […]

items.title: The Cost to Watch Purdue Men’s Basketball
items.summary: The Big Ten conference finally released the full TV schedule and tipoff times for the season and so now the 2025-2026 men’s basketball schedule is fully fully complete. For real this time. I posted the details of the announcement in The Feed earlier so if you’d like to take a quick look you can do […]

items.title: Braden Smith Named Preseason Big Ten POY
items.summary: Today the Big Ten announced its preseason all-Big Ten men’s basketball teams and it is absolutely no surprise that Purdue is well reprsented. Braden Smith, the reigning Big Ten Player of the Year, was a unanimous First Team selection and the Preseason Big Ten Player of the Year. That was to be expected, as he […]

items.title: 31 Days to Purdue Basketball – #32 Jace Rayl
items.summary: Legacy walk-on, #32 Jace Rayle, is our mark to Purdue basketball as we get closer to just a month away from college hoops. Technically, 32 days out was yesterday, but Purdue football took precedent and we’re playing catch-up with the Kokomo native whose father played at Purdue before him. Rayl is entering his third season […]
